description: Enhanced Discovery Page and Search - Expand the discover page (app/discover/page.tsx) with comprehensive browsing categories (genre, mood, decade, country, activity, theme), hidden gems section, popular this week, community favorites. Enhance search with advanced filters, search suggestions/history from lib/recent-searches.ts, trending searches, instant results dropdown, and fuzzy matching.
steps: Create lib/browse-categories.ts: Define category data for mood (happy, sad, energetic, calm, romantic, melancholic, upbeat, dark), decade (50s-2020s), country (US, UK, Japan, Korea, Latin, Africa, India, France), activity (workout, study, sleep, commute, cooking, gaming, meditation), theme (summer, winter, road trip, party, breakup, nostalgia). Each with name, gradient color, search query, and icon name (from Lucide).
Create app/components/discover/BrowseByMood.tsx: Grid of mood cards with gradient backgrounds and Lucide icons, links to search with mood filter.
Create app/components/discover/BrowseByDecade.tsx: Timeline-style decade cards with era-appropriate styling.
Create app/components/discover/BrowseByCountry.tsx: Country cards with flag emojis and gradient backgrounds.
Create app/components/discover/BrowseByActivity.tsx: Activity cards with relevant Lucide icons.
Create app/components/discover/HiddenGems.tsx: Section showing lesser-known tracks (use iTunes search with niche terms), with explanatory subtitle.
Create app/components/discover/PopularThisWeek.tsx: Numbered list of top tracks this week from Apple RSS feed.
Update app/discover/page.tsx: Integrate all new browse sections in a tabbed or scrollable layout. Add sections for Browse by Mood, Decade, Country, Activity, Theme below existing content.

Create app/components/search/SearchSuggestions.tsx: Dropdown below search bar showing recent searches (from lib/recent-searches.ts), trending searches (from Apple RSS trending), and type-ahead suggestions. Show when search input is focused.
Create app/components/search/InstantResults.tsx: As user types (debounced 300ms), show preview results (3 tracks, 2 artists, 1 album) in a dropdown below search bar before full page results load.

Update app/components/SearchBar.tsx: Integrate SearchSuggestions and InstantResults. Add keyboard navigation (arrow keys to navigate suggestions, Enter to select, Escape to close). Show trending searches when empty and focused.

Create app/components/search/AdvancedFilters.tsx: Expandable filter panel with year range slider, genre multi-select, explicit content toggle, duration range, and sort options. Works with existing SearchFilterChips pattern.
acceptance_criteria: Discover page shows Browse by Mood, Decade, Country, and Activity sections with properly styled cards
Each browse card links to search results filtered appropriately
Hidden Gems section displays lesser-known tracks with proper styling
Search bar shows suggestions dropdown when focused (recent + trending)
Instant results appear as user types with debounced API calls
Keyboard navigation works in search suggestions (up/down/enter/escape)
Advanced filters panel expands with year, genre, explicit, and sort options
All new components follow glass-card styling and design token system
Build passes with zero TypeScript errors
verification: eval "$(mise activate bash)" && bun run lint
eval "$(mise activate bash)" && bun run build
